Why She Stands Out

Proven surrogate

Two completed surrogacy journeys with easy, healthy, full-term pregnancies. Her children have supported her through both and understand the process well.

Birth is her profession

A working birth doula, postpartum doula, and birth and newborn photographer. She lives and breathes pregnancy support, and plans to become a midwife.

Clean medical history

Four pregnancies, four vaginal deliveries. No gestational diabetes, no pre-eclampsia, no hypertension, no postpartum depression, no C-sections, no preterm births.

Lifestyle & Personality

How would you describe your personality? "Outgoing, caring, sincere, honest, humble."
Goals & ambitions "I want to get my masters and become a midwife."
A typical day "I mostly just work. I have prenatal visits with my mamas, postpartum visits, I'm on call for births, I also have maternity shoots, newborn shoots, and occasionally a first birthday or family shoot. I also often am fulfilling a postpartum contract."
Family activities "Anything outdoors. We love to travel and see places we never have before. Currently trying to see all state and national parks."
Hobbies & talents "So many! Really anything involving water and the outdoors. I'm a hidden artist and can do anything if I hyperfixate on it for a day."
To relaxLashes and swimming

Favorite sportGolf

Favorite food"Alll of it"
